title: Axebot
move_pattern: Normally starts directly in a random rotation: The One-Two (weight 2), Sharpen (cannot repeat consecutively), or Hammer Uppercut (weight 2). All moves loop back to the same random rotation. When summoned via a special effect that sets a stock override amount, starts with Boot Up before entering the random rotation.
notes: Axebot spawns with 2 Stock by default. Boot Up (Block + Strength) is only the opening move when Axebot is summoned mid-combat with an explicit stock override — normal encounters skip it and go straight to the random rotation. Sharpen applies 4 Strength but cannot be used twice in a row. Hammer Uppercut applies both Weak and Frail to its target.
